insights: Facsimile signatures appear in 33% of rejections (2/6); genuine autographed cards in confirmations feature real ink.
100% of confirmations (2/2) have specific set/year/card number match; rejections show 50% mismatch rate.
Novelty/print terminology and vague titles ('group of noted') are strong rejection signals; confirmed snipes use precise year + set + card # format.
Emoji spam and promotional language ('🔥🚀⭐️') correlate with rejections; confirmations use clean, descriptive titles.
Confirmed snipes show 81-82% price delta vs. market avg; rejections lack pricing context but feature condition/authenticity red flags.
Wrong set/year/parallel codes account for 50% of rejections (3/6); title-card mismatch in rejections but never in confirmations.
